_README: Hand-edited S3 overlay (persists across regeneration). renames:{surfaceKey:newName}. placements:{surfaceKey:{shellRegion?,menuGroup?,menuSubgroup?,order?}} — route/href NOT changeable here. manualMenus:[{name, location:{region,group,subgroup?}, contractIntent:"static|view:<Vi_SPC_*>|endpoint:<path>|none", archetype?, order?}] — provide name+location+intent; S3 GENERATES the href.
